elements.title: Fulvia
elements.contents: ... that, according to Sallust, Fulvia revealed the details of the Catilinarian conspiracy to Cicero (event pictured)?

elements.title: Manuscript Society of New York
elements.contents: ... that the Manuscript Society of New York provided opportunities to women composers at a time when such support was rarely found elsewhere?

elements.title: Betbunia
elements.contents: ... that Betbunia is Bangladesh's first ground station?

elements.title: La Estrella
elements.contents: ... that La Estrella, Spain, became a ghost town in 2023, after its final two permanent inhabitants moved away?

elements.title: Roosevelt Blackmon
elements.contents: ... that Roosevelt Blackmon went from college water boy to NFL player?

elements.title: Race Across the World series 6
elements.contents: ... that a sacking meant that a Race Across the World series 6 spin-off announced its host with hours to spare?

elements.title: Akilagpa Sawyerr
elements.contents: ... that, while Akilagpa Sawyerr was a law student in London, he petitioned the Privy Council on behalf of men sentenced to death in South Africa's Zulu Rebellion?

elements.title: a 19th-century Chinese newspaper
elements.contents: ... that a 19th-century Chinese newspaper helped to establish a cemetery for courtesans?

elements.title: Hannah Cruz
elements.contents: ... that Lin-Manuel Miranda showed Hannah Cruz a tunnel to her husband?
